category_sources: source_facts.description says evade the Yeti on jet-powered skis; official GitLab project information describes ski as a hotdogging game.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ski; official GitLab project title is ski.
docs_sources: Official GitLab project exposes README as the primary source; source_facts.homepage is the project homepage and is a reasonable fallback documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.com/esr/ski, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitLab project information identify ski as a game played on jet-powered skis.
